message:
feat(core): add host-project attribution resolver and harden six modules

Host Adapter — new HostProjectAttribution system:
- HostProjectAttribution struct with resolved_project_key, confidence_score,
  reason_code, and collision flag for multi-source project identification.
- resolve_host_project_attribution() implements deterministic 3-source
  resolution (adapter identity weight=4, telemetry key weight=3, host name
  hint weight=1) with alphabetically-first tiebreaker for reproducibility.
- canonical_projects_from_hint() maps freeform strings to known project keys
  (cass, xf, mcp_agent_mail_rust, frankenterm) via substring matching.
- ConformanceCheck trait and ConformanceResult for adapter contract validation.
- 12 tests covering resolution, collisions, unknown fallback, conformance.

Distributed Observability — wildcard match arm elimination:
- Replace catch-all `_ => {}` in emit_info_event and emit_warn_event with
  explicit variant listings. This turns future variant additions into compile
  errors rather than silent no-ops, preventing missed telemetry coverage.

Generation — two correctness fixes:
- CommitRange::len(): Fix potential underflow when high < low by adding an
  explicit guard returning 0 instead of relying on saturating_sub which would
  incorrectly return 1 (from +1 after saturating to 0).
- check_repair_descriptors(): Add NaN guard before range check on
  overhead_ratio. NaN fails both `< 0.0` and `> 10.0` comparisons, so
  NaN ratios would silently pass validation without this check.

Metrics Eval — simplify usize_to_f64:
- Replace u32::try_from(value).map_or_else(|_| f64::from(u32::MAX), f64::from)
  with direct `value as f64` cast annotated with cast_precision_loss allow.
  The previous implementation silently clamped values above u32::MAX to
  4_294_967_295.0 which is incorrect; the direct cast preserves the actual
  value with acceptable precision loss for IR metric computation.

Repair — lock scope tightening:
- Remove redundant .clone() calls after mutex lock in unrepaired_count().
  The cloned Vecs were immediately passed to unrepaired_artifacts() by
  reference; passing the locked guard references directly avoids the
  allocation while the lock is still held for an equally brief duration.
- Restructure corrupted_artifact_paths() to release both mutex guards
  before sorting the result, using a block scope to limit lock lifetime.

Time Travel — O(n²) to O(n) pruning:
- Replace while-loop calling retained.remove(0) (which shifts all elements
  left on each call) with a single retained.drain(..excess) call that
  removes the excess prefix in one operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
